other.name: Emplacement Platform
other.description: Friendly **^^Astra Militarum Infantry**^^ models can be set up or end any type of move on top of the platform section of this **^^Fortification^^**.

other.name: Reinforced Cover
other.description: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this **^^Fortification^^**, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

other.name: Defence Line
other.description: While an **^^Astra Militarum Infantry^^** model has the Benefit of Cover as a result of this terrain feature, that model has a 4+ invulnerable save

other.name: Deployment
other.description: When this model is set up, it will consist of 1 platform section, up to 5 shield sections, up to 2 broken shield sections and up to 2 end sections. All sections must be connected to each other to form a continuous defence line; the 2 broken shield sections can be placed either at the end of the defence line, or in the middle of it such that both are within ½" of each other (in this case, these 2 sections count as being connected to each other). All of the sections that have been set up are then treated as a single model for all rules purposes.

other.name: Mobile Hunter-killers
other.description: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a **^^Monster^^** or **^^Vehicle^^** unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

other.name: Horsemasters
other.description: This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Laspistol; Lasgun; ➤ Hunting lance - frag tip; ➤ Hunting lance - melta tip; Steed's hooves; Laspistol; Lasgun; Goad lance; Steed's hooves; Lasgun; Laspistol; Steed's hooves.

other.name: Rolling Fortress
other.description: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to an **^^Astra Militarum^^** model from your army, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this **^^Baneblade^^** model, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Baneblade cannon; Armoured tracks; Coaxial autocannon; Demolisher cannon; Heavy stubber; Lascannon; Twin heavy bolter.

other.name: Tremor Quake
other.description: In your Shooting phase, just after selecting a target for this model’s tremor cannon, the target unit and every other enemy **^^Infantry^^** unit within 3" of that unit must take a Battle-shock test.

other.name: Transport
other.description: This model has a transport capacity of 26 **^^Astra Militarum Infantry models^^**. Each **^^Ogryn^^** model takes up the space of 3 models. It cannot transport **^^Artillery^^** models.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Tremor cannon; Armoured tracks; Lascannon; Twin heavy bolter.

other.name: Armour Obliteration
other.description: Each time an attack made with this model’s quake cannon destroys an enemy model that has the Deadly Demise ability, that model’s Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 3+ instead of on a 6.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Quake cannon; Armoured tracks; Lascannon; Twin heavy bolter.

other.name: Earthshaker Rounds
other.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with its earthshaker cannon scored a hit against an enemy **^^Infantry^^** unit, until the start of your next Shooting phase, that unit is shaken. While a unit is shaken, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Earthshaker cannon; Armoured tracks.

other.name: Wall of Muscle
other.description: Each time an attack is allocated to a model in this unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Close combat weapon; Close combat weapon.

other.name: Senior Officer
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability

other.name: Get Back in the Fight
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Power fist; Bolt pistol; Laspistol; ➤ Plasma pistol - standard; ➤ Plasma pistol - supercharge; Power weapon; Chainsword; Close combat weapon; Boltgun.

other.name: Cadia Stands!
other.description: While this unit contains an **^^Officer^^**, each time a ranged attack targets this unit, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, models in this unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

other.name: Shock Troops
other.description: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Sergeant's autogun.

other.name: Mobile Command Vehicle
other.description: In your Command phase, one **^^Officer^^** model embarked within this **^^Transport^^** can issue Orders even though it is not on the battlefield. When doing so, measure distances to and from this *^^Transport^^**.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Lasgun array; Armoured tracks; Heavy bolter; Heavy flamer; Multi-laser; Storm bolter; Heavy stubber; Hunter-killer missile.

other.name: Summary Execution
other.description: Once per battle round, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly **^^Astra Militarum Infantry^^** unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. If you do, one model in that unit is destroyed, and that unit is then no longer Battle-shocked.

other.name: Political Overwatch
other.description: While another **^^Officer^^** model is in the same unit as this model, you can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for that unit.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Power weapon; Chainsword; Bolt pistol; ➤ Plasma pistol - standard; ➤ Plasma pistol - supercharge.

other.name: Grim Demeanour
other.description: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if this unit is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if this unit is Below Half-strength.

other.name: Deathstrike Missile
other.description:
In your Shooting phase, each time this model is selected to shoot, if it has not shot with its  Deathstrike missile this battle, you can do one of the following in addition to resolving this model’s ranged attacks:

- **Designate Target:** If this model does not have a Deathstrike Target marker on the battlefield, place a Deathstrike Target marker for this model anywhere on the battlefield.

- **Adjust Target:** If this model has a Deathstrike Target marker on the battlefield, move that marker to anywhere else on the battlefield.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Deathstrike Missile; Armoured tracks.

other.name: Close-range Titan Killer
other.description: Each time this model’s magma cannon targets a **^^Monster^^** or **^^Vehicle^^** unit, that target is always considered to be within half range of that weapon.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Magma cannon; Armoured tracks; Lascannon; Twin heavy bolter.

other.name: Rearm, Reload, Fire
other.description: While this unit is being affected by an Order, provided it Remained Stationary this turn, all Heavy weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability

other.name: Covert Stealth Team

In the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.

other.name: Armoured Spearhead

other.name: Line-breaker
other.description: When making ranged attacks with its demolisher battle cannon, this model can target enemy units within Engagement Range of it (provided no other friendly units are also within Engagement Range of that enemy unit). In addition, when making ranged attacks, this model does not suffer the penalty to its Hit rolls for being within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Demolisher battle cannon; Armoured tracks.

other.name: Withering Hail
other.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with its exterminator autocannon. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly **^^Astra Militarum^^** unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per phase.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Exterminator autocannon; Armoured tracks.

other.name: Tank-killer
other.description: Each time this model makes a ranged attack with its vanquisher battle cannon that targets a **^^Monster^^** or **^^Vehicle^^** unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Armoured tracks; Vanquisher battle cannon.

other.name: Mow Down the Enemy
other.description: Each time this model makes an attack with its punisher gatling cannon that targets an enemy unit (excluding **^^Monsters^^** and **^^Vehicles^^**), that attack has the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Punisher gatling cannon; Armoured tracks.

other.name: The Lord Solar
other.description: At the start of your Command phase, If this model is on the battlefield, you gain 1CP.

other.name: The Collegiate Astrolex
other.description: After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three **^^Astra Militarum^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

other.name: Supreme Commander
other.description: If this model is in your army, it must be your **^^Warlord^^**.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Sol's Righteous Gaze; Conquest; Konstantin's hooves.

other.name: Furious Barrage
other.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding **^^Monsters^^** and **^^Vehicles^^**) that was hit by one or more of those attacks made with this model's storm eagle rockets. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, that enemy unit is staggered. While a unit is staggered, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit (to a minimum of 1).

composition.equipment: equipped with: Storm eagle rockets; Armoured tracks.

other.name: Medi-pack
other.description: At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer's unit is below its Starting Strength, you can return up to D3 destroyed Tempestus Scions models to this unit.

other.name: Command Rod
other.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, that unit can be affected by up to two different Orders at the same time.

other.name: Tempestor Prime
other.description: While this unit contains a Tempestor Prime, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Close combat weapon; Hot-shot lasgun; Close combat weapon; Hot-shot laspistol; Close combat weapon; Close combat weapon; Hot-shot laspistol; Hot-shot lasgun.

other.name: Thunderous Head-butt
other.description: Each time this model’s unit is selected to fight, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model and roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

other.name: Loyal Protector
other.description:
At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this model must join one **^^Command Squad^^** unit from your army (a **^^Command Squad^^** cannot have more than one **^^Loyal Protector^^** model joined to it). This model then counts as part of that **^^Command Squad^^** for the rest of the battle, and its Starting Strength is increased accordingly. If it is not possible to join this model to a **^^Command Squad^^**, it does not take part in the battle and counts as having been destroyed. 

While this model is joined to a unit, it can embark within any **^^Transport^^** that unit can embark within, and takes up the space of 3 models.

This model cannot be selected as your **^^Warlord^^**.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Huge knife; Ripper gun.

other.name: Loyal Protector
other.description:
At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this model must join one **^^Command Squad^^** unit from your army (a **^^Command Squad^^** cannot have more than one **^^Loyal Protector^^** model joined to it). This model then counts as part of that **^^Command Squad^^** for the rest of the battle, and its Starting Strength is increased accordingly. If it is not possible to join this model to a **^^Command Squad^^**, it does not take part in the battle and counts as having been destroyed. 

While this model is joined to a unit, it can embark within any **^^Transport^^** that unit can embark within, and takes up the space of 3 models.


This model cannot be selected as your **^^Warlord^^** and cannot be given Enhancements.

other.name: Slabshield
other.description: The bearer has a Wounds characteristic of 7.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Close combat weapon; Bullgryn maul; Huge knife; Ripper gun; Grenadier gauntlet.

other.name: Point-blank Barrage
other.description: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Ripper gun; Ripper gun.

other.name: Malign Wardings (Psychic)
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks

other.name: Psychic Barrier (Psychic)
other.description: At the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, you can roll one D6: on a 1, this **^^Psyker^^**’s unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2+, until the end of the phase, models in this **^^Psyker^^**’s unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

composition.equipment: equipped with: ➤ Psychic maelstrom - witchfire; ➤ Psychic maelstrom - focused witchfire; Force weapon; Laspistol.

other.name: Vengeance for the Omnissiah
other.description: If a friendly **^^Astra Militarum Vehicle^^** model is destroyed within 12" of this model, until the end of the battle, this model’s Enginseer axe has an Attacks characteristic of 6

other.name: Omnissiah’s Blessing
other.description: In your Command phase, select one friendly **^^Astra Militarum Vehicle^^** model within 3" of this model. That **^^Vehicle^^** model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, that **^^Vehicle^^** model has a 4+ invulnerable save. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

other.name: Enginseer
other.description: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly **^^Astra Militarum Vehicle^^** units, this model has the Lone Operative ability

composition.equipment: equipped with: Enginseer Axe; Mechanicus pistol; Servo-arm.

other.name: Ablative Plating
other.description: Once per battle, when an attack is allocated to this model, you change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Armoured tracks; Heavy stubber; Coaxial autocannon; Oppressor cannon; Twin battle cannon; Castigator gatling cannon; Pulveriser cannon; Multi-melta; Heavy bolter; Meltagun.

other.name: Daring Recon
other.description: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this unit. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly **^^Astra Militarum^^** model makes an attack that targets that unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

other.name: Titan-killer
other.description: Each time this model makes a ranged attack with its volcano cannon that targets a **^^Monster^^** or **^^Vehicle^^** unit, that attack has the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Volcano cannon; Armoured tracks; Lascannon; Twin heavy bolter.

other.name: Like Fighting a Shadow
other.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move. If it does, until the end of the turn, this model is not eligible to declare a charge.

other.name: One-man Army
other.description: Once per turn, in your opponent's Shooting phase, when an enemy unit makes a ranged attack that targets a friendly **^^Regiment^^** unit within 3" of this model, after that enemy unit has shot, this model can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but it must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Ripper pistol; Envenomed blade.

other.name: Mount Up!
other.description: At the end of your opponent’s Movement phase, if there are no models currently embarked within this **^^Transport^^**, you can select one friendly **^^Astra Militarum Infantry^^** unit (excluding **^^Artillery^^** units) that is wholly within 6" of this **^^Transport^^**. Unless that unit is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can embark within this **^^Transport^^**.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Vulcan mega-bolter; Twin heavy bolter; Lascannon; Heavy stubber; Armoured tracks.

other.name: Death Befitting An Officer
other.description: When this model is destroyed, roll one D6: on a 2+, do not remove it from play – it can, after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, shoot as if it were your Shooting phase and as if it had its full wounds remaining. This model is then removed from play.

other.name: Vox-net
other.description: Each time this model issues an Order, it can issue it to an eligible unit up to 12" away

other.name: Rapid Deployment
other.description: Units can disembark from this **^^Transport^^** after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Storm bolter; Twin autocannon; Armoured tracks.

other.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks. Unit the start of your next Shooting phase, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

other.name: Jungle Fighters
other.description: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, if this unit made a Charge move or was charged this turn, add 1 to the Wound roll.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Laspistol; Close combat weapon; Close combat weapon; Lasgun; Close combat weapon; Flamer; Close combat weapon; Lasgun; Close combat weapon; Flamer; Laspistol; Close combat weapon.

other.name: Concussive Wave
other.description: In your Shooting phase, just after selecting a target for this model’s Stormsword siege cannon, roll one D6 for the target unit and every other unit within 3" of that unit: on a 5+, the unit being rolled for is struck by a concussive wave. After this model has finished making its attacks against that target unit this phase, each unit struck by a concussive wave suffers D3 mortal wounds.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Stormsword siege cannon; Twin heavy bolter; Lascannon; Armoured tracks; Twin heavy flamer.

other.name: Screening Line
other.description: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6".

composition.equipment: equipped with: Steed's savage claws; Power sabre; Death Rider lascarbine; Frag lance; Steed's savage claws; Frag lance; Power sabre; Death Rider lascarbine.

other.name: Demolition Charges
other.description: Each time this model or an enemy unit ends a move, if this model is within 3" of one or more enemy units, select one of those enemy units. This model is destroyed, but instead of rolling for its Deadly Demise ability, roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D6 mortal wounds.

other.name: Unstable Payload
other.description: When rolling for this model’s Deadly Demise ability, units within 6" suffer mortal wounds on a 4+, instead of on a 6.

other.name: Compact
other.description: This model can embark within an ASTRA MILITARUM TRANSPORT model as if it were an INFANTRY model. If it does, it takes up the space of 7 models.

other.name: Fiery Vengeance
other.description: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, when another friendly ASTRA MILITARUM unit within 6" of this model is destroyed by an attack made by a unit that can Fly, one model from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, that model can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

composition.equipment: equipped with: Avenger bolt cannon; Armoured hull; Heavy stubber; Lascannon.

other.name: Gung-ho Executioners
other.description: Each time this model makes an attack with its executioner plasma cannon that targets a unit that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Hit roll.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Armoured tracks; ➤ Executioner plasma cannon - standard; ➤ Executioner plasma cannon - supercharge.

other.name: Precision Drop
other.description: In your Movement phase, when this unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can perform a precision drop. If it does, this unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, but until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

other.name: Servo-sentry
other.description: When this unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, the Tempestor Aquilon can shoot with its sentry weapon (its sentry flamer, sentry grenade launcher or sentry hot‑shot volley gun).

composition.equipment: equipped with: Hot-shot lascarbine; Close combat weapon; Hot-shot laspistol; Close combat weapon; Hot-shot laspistol; Close combat weapon; Hot-shot long las; Close combat weapon; Close combat weapon; Close combat weapon.

other.name: Shoot Sharp and Scarper
other.description: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, it can make a Normal move as if it were your Movement phase. If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

other.name: Ratling Battlemutt
other.description:
Once per battle, when this unit is selected to shoot, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

**Designer’s Note:** *Place a Ratling Battlemutt token next to the unit, removing it once this ability has been used.*

other.name: Demolition Gear
other.description: The bearer’s unit has the **^^Grenades^^** keyword.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Close combat weapon; Sniper rifle; Close combat weapon; Tankstopper rifle.

other.name: Tough to Kill
other.description: The first time this model is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with D3 wounds remaining.

other.name: Leading the Charge
other.description: Each time this model's unit makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Sabre of Sacrifice; Savage claws; Laspistol.

other.name: Grim Determination
other.description: While this unit contains an **^^Officer^^**, you can target this unit with Stratagems even while it is Battle-shocked and Orders issued to this unit do not cease to affect this unit if it becomes Battle-shocked.

other.name: Alchemyk Counteragents
other.description: The bearer's unit has the Feel No Pain 6+ ability against mortal wounds.

other.name: Servo-scribes
other.description:
Once per battle, when issuing an Order, the Lord Commissar can issue one additional Order.


Designer's Note: Place a Servo-scribes token next to the unit, removing it when this ability has been used.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Close combat weapon; Laspistol; Close combat weapon; Close combat weapon; Lasgun; Close combat weapon; Lasgun.

other.name: Gung-ho Command
other.description: While this unit contains an **^^Officer^^**, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[ASSAULT]** ability.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Close combat weapon; Laspistol; Lasgun; Close combat weapon; Laspistol; Lasgun; Close combat weapon; Laspistol; Lasgun; Close combat weapon; Laspistol; Lasgun; Close combat weapon; Laspistol; Flamer; Close combat weapon; Laspistol; ➤ Grenade launcher - frag; ➤ Grenade launcher - krak; Close combat weapon; Laspistol; Heavy flamer; Close combat weapon; Laspistol; Meltagun; Close combat weapon; Laspistol; ➤ Plasma gun - standard; ➤ Plasma gun - supercharge; Close combat weapon; Laspistol; Sniper rifle.

other.name: Remorseless Barrage
other.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with an Indirect Fire weapon scored a hit against an enemy unit, that unit must take a Battle-shock test (if an **^^Infantry^^** unit is hit by one or more attacks made by a multiple rocket launcher, they must subtract 1 from their Battle-shock test when doing so).

composition.equipment: equipped with: Crew close combat weapons; Heavy mortar; Siege cannon; Multiple rocket launcher; Heavy quad launcher; Lasgun.

other.name: Called Shots
other.description: Each time this model is selected to shoot, you can re-roll one Hit roll, you can re-roll one Wound roll and you can re-roll one Damage roll when resolving its attacks.

other.name: Vox-net
other.description: Each time this model issues an Order, it can issue it to an eligible unit up to 12" away

composition.equipment: equipped with: Armoured tracks; Heavy stubber; Castigator gatling cannon; Pulveriser cannon; Meltagun; Multi-melta; Heavy bolter; Coaxial autocannon; Oppressor cannon; Twin battle cannon.

other.name: War Hymns
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.

other.name: Holy Piety
other.description: Each time this model makes a melee attack, unless this model's unit is Battle-shocked, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Zealot's vindicator; Holy pistol; Power weapon.

other.name: Grenadiers
other.description: Once per turn, you can target this unit with the Grenade Stratagem for 0CP.

other.name: Remote mine
other.description:
Once per battle, at the start of your Shooting phase, you can select one enemy unit within 9" of and visible to the bearer and roll one D6: on 3+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds, or 2D3 mortal wounds instead if it is a **^^Vehicle^^** or **^^Fortifications^^** unit.

**Designer's Note:** *Place a Remote Mine token next to the unit, removing it once this ability has been used.*

other.name: Final Duty
other.description: While the Fire Coordinator model is on the battlefield, each time a Heavy Weapons Gunner model is destroyed, roll one D6: one a 3+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can shoot after the attacking model's unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

other.name: Embarking
other.description: While embarked within a **^^Transport^^**, each Heavy Weapons Gunner model takes up the space of 2 models, and each weapon equipped by these models is considered to be 2 models' weapons for the purposes of the Firing Deck ability.
